candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over subtotal/duplicate 'Total Revenue'.
Revenue subtotal duplicates 'Revenue' values; less preferred than the direct revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct revenue line and excluded the duplicate subtotal 'Total Revenue'.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Best candidate matching direct cost of sales / COGS for 2021-2024.

candidates.row_label: Costs of raw materials and consumables
candidates.why: Could be a COGS component, but appears unpopulated and less comprehensive than cost of goods/services sold.
Balance sheet inventory item, not an income statement expense; not appropriate for COGS.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Used the semantically correct income-statement COGS line from the candidate list. 2025 appears to present production costs in a more disaggregated format ('Cost' and 'Change in finished goods and work in pogress'), but the best available mapped COGS label is still 'Cost of goods and services sold'.

candidates.why: Valid overhead bucket and good SG&A component candidate.
Could be an SG&A component when populated, but appears separate and unpopulated here.
Balance sheet equity reserve, not an income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: REVIEWED.No explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected 'Other external expenses' from candidates and added 'Staff costs' from the full A-column because personnel costs are a core operating-overhead bucket and the candidate list clearly misses this likely SG&A component. Excluded depreciation/amortization and all finance items. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Staff costs

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line on the income statement; best match for XRD.
Balance sheet asset, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset line, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet construction/development asset, not expense.
Balance sheet gross asset line, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Acc Amortization Development Projects under Construction
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset line, not R&D expense.
Could relate to development spending, but on the balance sheet it is not the preferred period expense line.
Balance sheet net capitalized development costs, not expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists on the income statement, so selected it for XRD. Not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS because the selected XSGA buckets are generic overhead buckets likely already encompassing personnel/external operating costs; adding R&D separately there would risk double counting without clearer disclosure.

candidates.why: Most comprehensive single finance-cost line available; suitable fallback when separate pure interest expense is fragmented.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Direct interest expense label and preferred conceptually, but appears to capture only part of total financing cost here.
Direct label but appears unpopulated in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest component, but too narrow to represent total interest expense alone.
Finance-cost component but not clearly interest expense and appears unpopulated.
Direct label but appears unpopulated in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure and sign/inclusion may differ from primary statement line; lower priority.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used a priority list. 'Financial expenses' is the best single reported line likely capturing total financing cost consistently. More specific interest labels are included as lower-priority fallbacks because the statement appears to split some interest components, especially lease interest.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Best book equity line because it excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.
This is minority interest, not parent book equity.
Total equity includes non-controlling interests and would double count if MIB is also used.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total assets/liabilities+equity balancing line, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent-only equity to exclude non-controlling interests, consistent with BE + MIB construction.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings to NCI, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement earnings attribution, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.
Direct balance sheet NCI equity line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet minority equity label; useful fallback if nomenclature changes.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI lines as priority list; preferred over income statement profit-allocation lines.
